2026-06-29::dinner.name: Ground Beef Pasta with Spaghetti Sauce
2026-06-29::dinner.ingredients: 2 lbs cooked ground beef, jar spaghetti sauce, canned diced tomatoes, rotini pasta, shredded cheese
2026-06-29::dinner.note: Use cooked ground beef from fridge first

2026-06-30::dinner.name: Brined Roast Chicken with Roasted Green Beans and Red Potatoes
2026-06-30::dinner.protein: whole chicken (rotisserie stand-in: brine raw chicken)
2026-06-30::dinner.ingredients: 2 lbs raw chicken, kosher salt, sugar, garlic, small red potatoes, fresh green beans, olive oil, seasoning packets
2026-06-30::dinner.note: Anchor roast chicken; brine morning of

2026-07-01::dinner.name: Shredded Chicken Tacos (Date Night — kids eat from leftovers)
2026-07-01::dinner.ingredients: rotisserie chicken shredded, flour tortillas, shredded cheese, refried beans, salsa verde, carrots as side

2026-07-02::dinner.name: Cajun Sausages with Parboiled Rice and Sautéed Mixed Vegetables
2026-07-02::dinner.ingredients: 4 Cajun sausages (frozen), parboiled rice, frozen mixed vegetables, butter, onion, bell pepper, gumbo seasoning

2026-07-03::dinner.name: Friday Fish Fry — Canned Salmon Patties with French Fries and Canned Green Beans
2026-07-03::dinner.ingredients: 2 cans pink salmon, breadcrumbs, egg, flour, Old Bay, fridge french fries, canned green beans, butter
2026-07-03::dinner.note: Meatless Friday; use canned salmon on hand

2026-07-04::dinner.name: Fourth of July Cookout — Hamburgers, Pulled Pork, and Corn on the Cob
2026-07-04::dinner.ingredients: 4 hamburger patties, 1 lb pulled pork (frozen thawed), hamburger buns, frozen corn, romaine lettuce, shredded cheese, condiments

2026-07-05::dinner.name: Ziplock Buffet — Leftovers Cleared (Pasta, Chicken, Sausage, Salmon Patties)
2026-07-05::dinner.ingredients: all remaining leftovers from week, bread, sourdough, canned fruit cocktail, frozen mixed vegetables if needed

2026-07-06::dinner.name: Spinach Pie with Roasted Sweet Potatoes
2026-07-06::dinner.ingredients: 2 frozen pie crusts, frozen spinach, eggs, shredded cheese, white onion, sweet potatoes, olive oil, seasoning
